title: Adicea tetraphylla

Adina tetraphylla is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. It is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.

The bioactive constituents of Adina tetraphylla include alkaloids, phenolic compounds, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Adina tetraphylla include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
